summary: Iteration 3: All new features tested and working. 21/21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly including new Commission Module, Analytics tabs, Reports page, and fixed Cases filter bug.

console_warnings.component: Recharts on Dashboard, Commission, Analytics pages
console_warnings.issue: Chart container dimension warnings - ResponsiveContainer shows negative width(-1) and height(-1) during initial render
console_warnings.impact: LOW - Console warnings only, charts render and function correctly
console_warnings.note: Known issue from previous iterations. Charts work properly despite warning.

backend_api: GET /api/commission/monthly - returns monthly data with totals (pending, submitted, paid, clawed_back)
GET /api/commission/analytics - returns by_month, by_lender, by_product, by_lead_source, by_advisor, summary
GET /api/analytics/mortgage-types - returns types array with case_count, percentage, total_commission, avg_loan
GET /api/reports/cases-completed with date range - returns cases and summary
GET /api/reports/commission-paid with date range - returns cases and summary
Reports endpoints require date parameters (422 without)
Clients enriched data with case status, commission status, LTV
frontend_ui: Login page - email/password authentication via Enter key
Cases page - Filters button opens panel WITHOUT crashing (bug fixed)
Cases page - Status dropdown filter works
Cases page - Product Type dropdown filter works
Cases page - Commission Status dropdown filter works
Cases page - Advisor dropdown filter works
Cases page - Clear filters button works
Clients page - Shows all new columns (Security Address, Postcode, Loan Amount, Property Value, LTV, Case Status, Commission Status, Completion Date, Lead Source)
Clients page - Row highlighting legend visible (Completed=green, Lost=red, Expiring=amber)
Clients page - Export to Excel button visible and functional
Clients page - LTV badge with color coding (>90%=red, >75%=yellow, else=green)
Commission page - Summary cards (Total Paid, Pending, Proc Fees, Clawed Back)
Commission page - Mortgage vs Insurance split cards
Commission page - Monthly/YTD/Custom Range toggle works
Commission page - Monthly Commission Breakdown chart renders
Commission page - Monthly Revenue chart (Mortgage vs Insurance vs Proc Fees)
Commission page - Commission Tracker with status filter
Commission page - Forecast cards (30/60/90 days)
Analytics page - All 6 tabs present (Lead Analytics, Mortgage Types, Commission Analytics, Revenue, Pipeline, Retention)
Analytics page - Mortgage Types tab shows cards with percentages, pie chart, bar chart
Analytics page - Commission Analytics tab with filters, summary cards, 4 charts (by Month, by Lender, by Product Type, by Lead Source)
Reports page - accessible from sidebar nav
Reports page - Cases Completed tab with date range selector
Reports page - Commission Paid tab with date range selector
Reports page - Generate Report button produces results
Reports page - Export CSV and Export Excel buttons appear after generation
Sidebar nav - Reports link between Analytics and Documents

seed_data_creation: Test data: 1 case (John Smith, Halifax, Mortgage/Purchase, £360K, commission £1260, status application_submitted, commission_status submitted_to_lender)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features fully tested and working. The Cases filter crash bug was fixed by using 'all' sentinel values instead of empty strings in SelectItem components. Commission module shows monthly breakdown with status grouping (pending/submitted/paid/clawed_back). Analytics page has 6 tabs including new Mortgage Types and Commission Analytics tabs. Reports page allows generating and exporting cases completed and commission paid reports for any date range. Known console warning about chart dimensions is cosmetic only and doesn't affect functionality.

verification_status.cases_filter_bug: FIXED - Filters button opens without crashing
verification_status.commission_monthly_breakdown: PASS - All status grouping and toggle views work
verification_status.commission_analytics: PASS - All filters and charts work
verification_status.mortgage_types_analytics: PASS - Pie and bar charts render
verification_status.custom_reports: PASS - Both tabs, date range, generate, export work
verification_status.sidebar_reports_nav: PASS - Reports link present between Analytics and Documents
